focus_points.label: Impact and leverage she’s driving right now
focus_points.reason: What she’s framing as the top outcomes she owns, and how much business or team movement is actually attributable to her.

focus_points.label: Influence and visibility with stakeholders
focus_points.reason: Whether she’s getting credit and traction through proactive stakeholder engagement, rather than relying on good work being noticed automatically.

focus_points.label: How she’s choosing tradeoffs under pressure
focus_points.reason: What calls she’s making about when to go deep on execution versus when to escalate, align, or broaden visibility when cross-functional friction appears.

focus_points.label: Raising signal early in writing and updates
focus_points.reason: How she communicates progress, risks, and decisions so stakeholders can act—especially when the work isn’t yet fully “done.” This is a common Senior performance differentiator because it determines whether others can depend on the plan.
